channel.title: enola.bedard TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from enola.bedard

item.title: Jet Ski Dance Concept Video OUT NOW!!! Go watch the full video on my YouTube Channel 🫶🏻❤️ we had the best time making a full out public performance to this song literally my favourite 🇧🇷🇧🇷 @Pedro Sampaio @Melody.oficial.3 #jetski #brazil
item.description: Jet Ski Dance Concept Video OUT NOW!!! Go watch the full video on my YouTube Channel 🫶🏻❤️ we had the best time making a full out public performance to this song literally my favourite 🇧🇷🇧🇷 @Pedro Sampaio @Melody.oficial.3 #jetski #brazil
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Which languages do you speak??? Let me know in the comments!!! Comment UNAVEZ if youre excited for this song to come out 03/27🤩🫶🏻❤️ #unavez

item.title: Thank you all so so much on the love on my recent concept video to JET SKI🤩🫶🏻❤️ you guys are the best!!!! Let me know your favourite part in the comments! #jetski #brazil #dance #public

item.title: I had to create my own choreography to this part of the song🤩🙌🏻 comment JET SKI to see the results??? Watch the full video on my YouTube Channel #jetski #dance #brazil #behindthescenes

item.title: POV: you filmed a FULL OUT concept video to JET SKI in Santa Monica!!! This is one of my favourite part of the song and I had to choreograph a section to it!!!🤩🙌🏻 let me know what you think in the comments!! #jetski #brazil #santamonica

item.title: UNAVEEEZ!!! 🐚☀️🌊🌴🎶 It’s almost time… dropping TONIGHT at 9PM PT / 12AM EST!! Music video drops TOMORROW at 9AM PT 🎬 Comment “UNAVEZ” if you’re ready 🫶🏻
item.description: UNAVEEEZ!!! 🐚☀️🌊🌴🎶 It’s almost time… dropping TONIGHT at 9PM PT / 12AM EST!! Music video drops TOMORROW at 9AM PT 🎬 Comment “UNAVEZ” if you’re ready 🫶🏻

item.title: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10
